articles.title: 3 ways Cade Cunningham’s absence could impact the Celtics
articles.description:
Cunningham is out with a collapsed lung, and the Pistons say they'll re-evaluate his status two weeks from now.

The post 3 ways Cade Cunningham’s absence could impact the Celtics appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Cade Cunningham is out with a collapsed lung, affecting the Pistons' lineup.
Pistons will re-evaluate Cunningham's condition in two weeks, impacting upcoming games.
Celtics may benefit from Cunningham's absence in their upcoming match on March 19.

articles.title: Tesla faces wider probe of self-driving feature as it prepares to sell cars without steering wheels
articles.description:
The National Highway Traffic Safety Administration said it was examining nine crashes where the self-driving software failed to quickly alert drivers to take control in fog and other poor conditions because the vehicle's cameras weren't picking out road hazards.

The post Tesla faces wider probe of self-driving feature as it prepares to sell cars without steering wheels appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: NHTSA investigates nine crashes involving Tesla's self-driving software failures in poor conditions.
Tesla plans to sell cars without steering wheels, raising safety concerns for Boston drivers.
Local residents may face increased risks as self-driving technology undergoes scrutiny and development.

articles.title: Trump administration launches investigation of states, including Mass., that mandate health insurance covers abortion
articles.description:
The probes are the latest in a long-running dispute between the political parties on how to interpret a provision, known as the Weldon Amendment, that's included in federal spending laws each year.

The post Trump administration launches investigation of states, including Mass., that mandate health insurance covers abortion appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Trump administration investigates Massachusetts for mandating health insurance coverage for abortion services.
The inquiry focuses on the Weldon Amendment, affecting funding for states with such mandates.
Potential changes could impact health insurance options for Boston residents seeking abortion coverage.

articles.title: Readers say this is Massachusetts’ most stressful commute — and it’s not I-93 North
articles.description:
Despite a national ranking targeting the Zakim Bridge/I-93 North stretch, Boston.com readers say another commute is even worse.

The post Readers say this is Massachusetts’ most stressful commute — and it’s not I-93 North appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Readers identify the Zakim Bridge/I-93 North as less stressful than other commutes.
Massachusetts commuters report increased stress levels on alternative routes, impacting daily travel.
Local residents may face longer travel times and heightened frustration during peak hours.
